title: Player Shops TFC
description: This mod aims to provide compatibility between Player Shops by TalonsOfStealth and the total conversion mod TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) by the TFC Dev Team, by adding Player Shop blocks for the TFC wood types.
body:
This mod aims to provide compatibility between Player Shops by TalonsOfStealth and the total conversion mod TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) by the TFC Dev Team, by adding Player Shop blocks for the TFC wood types.

As an addon, it requires both Player Shops and TFC to work. Since TalonsOfStealth has not uploaded their mod to Modrinth, you will have to download it [separately](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/player-shops)!

If you have any issues, please report them on github!
